title: Hanumana Gundi Falls
tagline: Hanumana Gundi Falls — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Hanumana Gundi Falls, also known as Suthanabbe Falls or Soothanabbi Falls, is located in the hilly surroundings of the Kudremukh National Park in the Chikkamagaluru district of Kar
overview.description: Hanumana Gundi Falls, also known as Suthanabbe Falls or Soothanabbi Falls, is located in the hilly surroundings of the Kudremukh National Park in the Chikkamagaluru district of Karnataka, India. Hanumanagundi Falls is located between Karkala and Lakya Dam in the Kudremukh national park. Hanumanagundi Falls has an elevation of 996 m (3,268 ft). The water falls from a height of 22 m (72 ft) and is a tiered waterfall.

topPlaces.name: Gangamoola
topPlaces.description: Gangamoola is a hill in the Chikkamagaluru district of the state of Karnataka, India. Also known as Varaha Parvata, it is one of the hills in the Western Ghats range and is known for being the source of three rivers, Tunga, Bhadra and Netravathi.

items.note: Gangamoola is a hill in the Chikkamagaluru district of the state of Karnataka, India. Also known as Varaha Parvata, it is one of the hills in the Western Ghats range and is known for being the source of three rivers, Tunga, Bhadra and Netravathi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hanumana Gundi Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hanumana Gundi Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hanumana Gundi Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hanumana Gundi Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hanumana Gundi Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hanumana Gundi Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Hanumana Gundi Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
